title: Schema from YAML
description: Given a YAML file defining tables, GSIs, and associations, when I call Database.from_schema(path, data_dir), it should create a fully configured database. Declarative, versionable, shared between Rust and Python. Spec: features/schema/schema_from_yaml.feature

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: beginning Schema-from-YAML loader; plan spec-first for DB from schema definitions. Next: design specs and implement loader; Blockers: none.
